name: Classify and Enter an EHS Chemical with Full GHS Profile
description: The facility 'Arctic Cold Storage LLC' in Baton Rouge, LA is updating its Tier II inventory. You must add their main refrigeration chemical to the facility's records in the EPA Tier2 Submit application. First, import the facility's baseline data from C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Tier2Tasks\arctic_baseline.t2s. Then, add the following chemical to the facility: Anhydrous Ammonia (CAS: 7664-41-7). Designate it as a Pure chemical and an Extremely Hazardous Substance (EHS) because it has a TPQ of 500 lbs. Check all applicable physical hazards (Flammable, Gas under pressure, Corrosive to metal) and health hazards (Acute toxicity, Skin corrosion or irritation, Serious eye damage or eye irritation, Specific target organ toxicity) based on its SDS. For inventory, report the Maximum Daily Amount and Average Daily Amount using Range Code 04 (10,000 - 99,999 lbs), with 365 Days on site. Add a storage location named 'Main Refrigeration Machine Room' with storage type 'Tank inside building' and pressure set to 'Greater than ambient pressure'. Save and export your updated submission to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Tier2Output\arctic_submission.t2s.
